title: Brave Search node not recognized after pod restart
symptom: After restarting the n8n pod, the Brave Search node fails to activate, showing 'Unrecognized node type'. This requires manual installation of the node each time.
not_this_if: Node is recognized after initial installation
root_cause: The n8n instance does not automatically reinstall community nodes after a restart unless explicitly configured to do so. This can lead to unrecognized node types if the required packages are not present in the environment.
fix_steps: Add the environment variable N8N_REINSTALL_MISSING_PACKAGES=true to your n8n deployment
Restart the n8n pod to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Set the N8N_REINSTALL_MISSING_PACKAGES environment variable to true and restart the n8n pod.
